title: Collapsible Bucket 5L, Silicone Folding Bucket Portable Cleaning Buckets with Handle, Space-saving Mop Buckets for RV Home Outdoor Camping Beach Car Washing Laundry Wash Tub for Cleaning
features: Collapsible and Space-saving: The collapsible bucket with foldable design is ideal for saving space and easy storage. When not in use, our cleaning bucket with no lid can be folded into a compact shape of only 5cm high, saving up to 80% of space. The edge hanging hole design also allows the folding bucket to be hung on the wall or stored in small spaces such as cabinets, drawers or corners. This small bucket is a good helper in RVs, caravans or any room with limited space, perfect for camping, hiking, fishing and other outdoor activities

Convenient Handle and Groove: Our buckets with handles feature an ergonomic handle design, making it easy to carry water around. The groove at the bottom of the mop bucket enhances grip for easy pouring without strain. The spout design of the water bucket enables the water to flow out more smoothly and quickly. This folding bucket plumbing is suitable for various household cleaning tasks such as floor cleaning, car washing, dish washing, etc., and is a valuable aid in solving daily cleaning problems

Portable and Compact:The handy folding bucket is small and lightweight, and can be folded into a compact shape for storage without taking up space. When needed, just pull the collapsible basket lightly and it can be used directly. This outdoor folding bucket is equipped with a handle for easy movement. Whether you're going on a picnic, camping, traveling, or doing other outdoor activities, you can easily take the small bucket with handle with you and meet your water needs at any time

Multi-functional Application: The foldable folding water bucket can not only be used for storing water but also as a washbasin, laundry basin, car washing bucket, etc. Our collapsible bucket can also be used for storing miscellaneous items and other multiple purposes. Its flexibility and practicality make it an essential item in family and outdoor activities

Versatile Foldable Bucket: The car wash bucket is foldable, convenient to carry and store, allows it to be easily taken anywhere, suitable for most cleaning purposes, from gardening to household chores, and even as a playful accessory for children's activities, such as indoor cleaning, watering flowers, soaking feet, pet bath, car washing, picnics, hiking, playing in the sand on the beach

High-quality Material: Made of high-quality silicone, this mop bucket is sturdy, not easy to crack, and maintains its shape when filled with water, ensuring long-term use. This buckets for car washing with lightweight but durable construction ensures it can withstand frequent use and rough handling, making it a reliable choice for various daily cleaning tasks
